scripts.check: node --check fallback-core.mjs && node --check backend-probe.mjs && node --check compatibility-renderer.mjs && node --check app.mjs && node --check capture.mjs && node --check validate-artifacts.mjs && node --check fallback-harness.test.mjs
scripts.validate:quick: npm run check && npm run validate:unit
scripts.validate:full: npm run check && npm run validate:unit && npm run test:mutations && npm run capture && npm run validate:artifacts
